name: Multi-Asset Data Feasibility
edge_rationale: Before testing whether trial-00095-style sweep/reclaim transfers from BTC to ETH or SOL, the project must verify that non-BTC historical data can be sourced with quality comparable to the existing BTC research snapshot.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested in this milestone. The mechanism under evaluation is data feasibility: whether candles, funding, open interest, aggtrade-derived flow, and optional liquidation context are available, timestamp-clean, and alignable for offline research.
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, or settings changes.
No market data is persisted by this milestone.
ETH strategy research is not approved by a clean sample alone.
Full 2022-2026 backfill and separate data audit are required before any ETH transfer backtest.
Force-order/liquidation data remains optional and diagnostic unless archive coverage is separately proven.
SOL is deferred until ETH source feasibility is understood.
expected_observation: A useful result identifies whether ETHUSDT source APIs and daily archives are available and whether recent samples pass basic timestamp, missingness, duplicate, OHLC, volume, funding, OI, and aggtrade checks.

kill_criteria.api_unavailable: Any required recent sample family unavailable blocks data feasibility.
kill_criteria.candle_quality_failure: OHLC violations, duplicate candles, or more than 1% missing 15m/4h candles blocks the direction.
kill_criteria.flow_unavailable: No aggtrade-derived flow sample blocks trial-00095 transfer research because TFI/CVD features cannot be reconstructed.
kill_criteria.archive_coverage_risk: Archive family coverage below 75% makes full 2022-2026 backfill inconclusive until a provider plan exists.
kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/data persistence change invalidates this milestone.

failure_modes: Public REST samples are clean but historical archives are missing or inconsistent.
Open interest history has lookback/API limitations that require data.binance.vision ZIP ingestion.
Aggtrade coverage is too expensive or incomplete for 2022-2026 TFI reconstruction.
Liquidation snapshots differ by symbol or venue and cannot be used as a primary feature.
Sample quality looks good only for recent days and does not represent historical backfill quality.
out_of_scope: Writing sampled market data into SQLite.
Changing runtime, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, risk, or execution behavior.
author: Codex
